answer: So far the engine has found a stable mechanism map, a small set of supported causal bridges, and a clear front-running decision path for the next paper.
evidence_chain: The lead mechanism in the live atlas is Blood-Brain Barrier Dysfunction.
The strongest supported bridge right now is BBB permeability increase -> peripheral immune infiltration.

The current lead insight is that Subacute Repetitive Inflammatory-Dominant discriminator panel is the best readout set to carry the next paper story, because this panel is where phase 5 endotype logic becomes measurable instead of purely descriptive.
implication: We are no longer searching for the basic structure. We are choosing which path deserves commitment now.
recommended_follow_up: Use the primary decision card first. It is the shortest path to stronger decision confidence.
